note: The official BBA Syllabuses 2025-26 state that they apply to candidates admitted in 2025-26 and thereafter, subject to approval. This supplement is intentionally limited to HKU-UG-6755-70 / HKU-UG-6755-70-M1, the BBA Major in Finance. The 78-credit major comprises 24 credits of Faculty Core, 36 credits of Disciplinary Core, and 18 credits of Disciplinary Electives. The Finance disciplinary elective appendix is a closed dated list for this syllabus: students complete 12 credits from that list, so the 12-credit FINA4392 Dissertation can satisfy the credit requirement by itself. Courses are not necessarily offered every year. Language, Common Core, AI literacy and 108 credits of free electives remain outside this Programme-local supplement because those requirements contain open or placeholder course ranges.

supplements.programmeName: Bachelor of Business Administration (Major in Finance)
supplements.majorName: Bachelor of Business Administration (Major in Finance)
supplements.ruleSummary: 78 major credits: 24 Faculty Core credits (ACCT1101, ECON1210, FINA1310, and one 6-credit statistics option); 36 Disciplinary Core credits (ECON1220, one 6-credit mathematics option, ECON2280, FINA2320, FINA2322, and ECON4200 capstone); and 18 Disciplinary Elective credits (one 6-credit business option plus 12 credits from the Finance disciplinary elective list).
supplements.evidenceGap: The official document is marked subject to approval and says listed courses are not necessarily offered every year. It gives broad Year 2/3/4 ranges rather than a single normative year for the business option and Finance disciplinary electives, so those rows do not receive a recommendedYear. Language, Common Core, AI literacy and free electives are open or partly placeholder-coded requirements and are excluded.
